description: St. Paul & The Broken Bones are a powerhouse soul ensemble from Alabama known for their electrifying live shows and impassioned vocals. The group has shared stages with The Rolling Stones and Black Pumas, and has performed at major festivals like Coachella, Glastonbury, Lollapalooza, and Bonnaroo. Their new self-titled sixth album marks a creative renewal, melding the band’s adventurous spirit with a return to soulful, song-focused roots.
subtitle: USA
title: St. Paul & The Broken Bones
